migration_policy: additive until 1.x; breaking changes require migration note, fixture update, backwards-compatibility decision, explicit reviewer approval
title: CC transcript correction dictionary
description: ASR-error corrections applied during transcript ingestion. Corrections are suggestions (a diff for human review), never silent replacements. The pipeline is deterministic: same transcript + same dictionary version = byte-identical output. Every applied correction is logged into the produced note's front-matter.

auto_requires_guard.description: Any future 'auto' mode requires a context_regex guard; blind substitution is forbidden (e.g. 'pen' also appears in 'pen test').

wrong.description: Misheard/mistranscribed form. Unique key (case-insensitive) across entries.

confidence.description: high = strong auto-suggestion; medium = suggest with context; low = mark [VERIFY]; never_auto = human review required.

context_regex.description: Correction is suggested only when nearby text matches. Required for any non-suggest mode.

never_before.description: Regex: never suggest when the wrong form is immediately followed by this (e.g. pen + 'test').
